  if [ -f "/Users/simon/Documents/Code/nullrabbit/nr-scan-oss/discovery-agent/tests/$f" ]; then

  else

  fi
done)
Bash(PYTHONPATH=. venv/bin/pytest tests/test_cdn_detection.py tests/test_summary.py tests/test_db.py tests/test_sui_tools.py tests/test_solana_tools.py -v --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -50)

Bash(psql postgresql://nr_scan:nr_scan_dev@localhost:5433/nr_scan -c "
SELECT service_type, COUNT\(*\) 
FROM discovery.hosts h
JOIN discovery.networks n ON n.id = h.network_id
WHERE n.name = 'solana'
GROUP BY service_type ORDER BY count DESC;
" && psql postgresql://nr_scan:nr_scan_dev@localhost:5433/nr_scan -c "
SELECT service_type, COUNT\(*\) 
FROM discovery.hosts h
JOIN discovery.networks n ON n.id = h.network_id
WHERE n.name = 'sui'
GROUP BY service_type ORDER BY count DESC;
")

Bash(psql postgresql://nr_scan:nr_scan_dev@localhost:5433/nr_scan -c "
-- Solana: duplicate IPs \(same IP, different port/service\)
SELECT ip_address::text, COUNT\(*\) as rows, array_agg\(DISTINCT port\) as ports, array_agg\(DISTINCT service_type\) as services
FROM discovery.hosts h
JOIN discovery.networks n ON n.id = h.network_id
WHERE n.name = 'solana' AND ip_address IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY ip_address
HAVING COUNT\(*\) > 1
ORDER BY rows DESC
LIMIT 10;
")

Bash(psql postgresql://nr_scan:nr_scan_dev@localhost:5433/nr_scan -c "
-- Sui: how many hostname-only records have a duplicate with an IP?
SELECT COUNT\(*\) as hostname_ip_dupes
FROM discovery.hosts h1
JOIN discovery.hosts h2 ON h2.network_id = h1.network_id
  AND h2.hostname = h1.hostname
  AND \(h2.port IS NOT DISTINCT FROM h1.port\)
  AND h2.ip_address IS NOT NULL
WHERE h1.ip_address IS NULL AND h1.hostname IS NOT NULL
  AND h1.network_id = \(SELECT id FROM discovery.networks WHERE name = 'sui'\);
" && psql postgresql://nr_scan:nr_scan_dev@localhost:5433/nr_scan -c "
-- Sui hostname-only: sample
SELECT hostname, port, service_type, confidence, last_seen_at::date
FROM discovery.hosts h
JOIN discovery.networks n ON n.id = h.network_id
WHERE n.name = 'sui' AND ip_address IS NULL
LIMIT 10;
")
